message:
feat: implement Progressive Web App (PWA) support

Complete PWA implementation with installability and offline capabilities:

Manifest (public/manifest.json):
- App name, short name, and description
- Standalone display mode for app-like experience
- Dark theme colors matching site design (#020617)
- App icons in 192x192 and 512x512 sizes
- Business/productivity/technology categories
- Start URL and scope configuration

PWA Icons (public/):
- icon-192.png: Standard app icon (192x192)
- icon-512.png: High-res app icon (512x512)
- Both icons follow PWA spec requirements

Install Prompt Component (components/pwa-install-prompt.tsx):
- Custom install prompt with Framer Motion animations
- Respects user's previous dismissal (30-day cooldown)
- Detects if already installed (display-mode: standalone)
- Shows after 5 seconds of browsing (non-intrusive timing)
- Clean UI with Download icon and gradient accent
- Handles beforeinstallprompt event with proper cleanup
- Prevents memory leaks with timeout cleanup
- AnimatePresence pattern for smooth entry/exit animations

Layout Integration (app/layout.tsx):
- Added manifest link in metadata API (Next.js App Router pattern)
- PWA icon configuration for both standard and Apple devices
- Apple-specific meta tags (status bar, capable)
- Proper metadata structure for PWA compliance

User Experience:
- Users on supported browsers see install prompt after brief delay
- Once dismissed, won't show again for 30 days
- Respects user preference and doesn't spam
- Smooth animations for professional feel
- Already-installed users never see the prompt

Technical notes:
- Uses Next.js 16 metadata API (no manual <head> tags)
- Proper TypeScript typing for beforeinstallprompt event
- Handles edge cases (already installed, dismissed, no browser support)
- All event listeners properly cleaned up to prevent leaks

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ export const metadata: Metadata = {
   title: siteConfig.title,
   description: siteConfig.description,
   metadataBase: new URL("https://jeffreyemanuel.com"),
+  manifest: "/manifest.json",
   appleWebApp: {
     capable: true,
     statusBarStyle: "black-translucent",
@@ -32,6 +33,15 @@ export const metadata: Metadata = {
   formatDetection: {
     telephone: false, // Prevent auto-linking phone numbers
   },
+  icons: {
+    icon: [
+      { url: "/icon-192.png", sizes: "192x192", type: "image/png" },
+      { url: "/icon-512.png", sizes: "512x512", type: "image/png" },
+    ],
+    apple: [
+      { url: "/icon-192.png", sizes: "192x192", type: "image/png" },
+    ],
+  },
   openGraph: {
     title: siteConfig.title,
     description: siteConfig.description,

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+{

+      "type": "image/png",
